case_title: JOSE BOTTO VS. OZAKI STANLEY ICHIRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---STEPHAN EMOCH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
